title: JetLayoutBoxArtifact
description: Structural layout-box capture used by the jet cross-stack parity comparator (ADR-002, issue #2146). One artifact per (fixture, renderer); the comparator pairs jet-side and reference-side artifacts by fixture_id and asserts structural equality with bounded tolerance.

schema_version.description: Artifact shape version. Bumped on incompatible changes; comparators refuse mismatched versions.

fixture_id.description: Kebab-case slug identifying the parity fixture. Pairs jet-side and reference-side artifacts.

renderer.description: Which stack produced this artifact. The comparator refuses to compare two artifacts with the same renderer value.

captured_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of capture. Used for triage only; never enters comparison.

tolerance.description: Per-fixture override of the default per-bound tolerance. Comparator rule: abs(jet - dom) <= max(n_px, r * dom_dim). Absent means use defaults (n_px=2, r=0.02).

n_px.description: Absolute pixel floor of the per-bound tolerance budget.

r.description: Relative tolerance as a fraction of the reference-side dimension on that axis.

nodes.description: Flat list of captured semantic nodes. Hierarchy is encoded by parent_id, not nesting.

semantic_id.description: Stable alignment key. Must match between jet-side and reference-side artifacts (fixtures stamp this on MUI via data-jet-parity-id).

role.description: ARIA role string. Compared exactly between sides.

name.description: Accessible name. If present on both sides, compared exactly; if absent on one side, the field is skipped.

parent_id.description: semantic_id of the parent node, or absent for the fixture root. Compared exactly; structural reparenting is a hard failure.

bounds.description: Absolute bounding box in CSS pixels in fixture-root coordinates (top-left origin). Sub-pixel values allowed.
